title: OHS Wreath Storage Bag, Circular Waterproof Christmas Wreath Storage Bag Decorations Ornaments Garland Wreath Storage Box - Red Nordic, 45cm
features: Christmas Garland Storage Bag: Safeguard Christmas wreaths from dust, moisture, and damage with lightweight wreath storage bag. Christmas wreath storage designed with durable, tear-resistant materials, keeping wreaths looking fresh and festive year after year.

45cm x 45m: Spacious round garland wreath storage accommodates large wreaths, up to 15cm height with extra room for garlands and other decorations. Christmas wreath storage bag ensures your seasonal decor stays neatly organised and ready for the next holiday season.

Visible clear window for easy viewing of wreath contents and dual zipper closures that provide quick and hassle-free access. Simply store away in cupboards and drawers and easily identify which wreath is in which storage bag.

Durable handles for hassle free transport from storage to living room. Wreath storage bag quipped with reinforced, sturdy handles for easy carrying and manoeuvring. Whether storing in your attic, garage, or closet, moving your wreaths has never been easier.

Nordic red storage bag adds a festive feel decor piece to home living. Round wreath storage box is collapsible for convenient storage when not in use, allowing you to maximise your storage space. Keep your holiday decorations organised without taking up unnecessary room.
description: Nordic wreath storage bag protects your Christmas wreaths and keep them looking like new year after year. Lightweight, durable and tear-resistant storage bag is designed to safeguard your wreaths from dust, moisture, and damage, ensuring they stay fresh and vibrant for every season. Garland storage bag with reinforced handles for easy transport and a zippered closure for secure storage, perfect for keeping your wreaths organised and tangle-free. Large spacious interior fits wreaths up to 45cm in diameter with 15cm in height. Storage bag made from water-resistant and dustproof material for added protection. Nordic red style wreath bag adds festive decor piece to home storage. Colour: Red - Nordic Size: 45cm x 45cm x 15cm Material: 100% Polyester Brand: OHS
